module:
Integration tests for embedding system integration with other subsystems.

These tests verify that the embedding system properly integrates with
linguistic, chunking, and tagging subsystems for enhanced functionality.

test_embedding_with_linguistic_preproces.docstring: Test embedding with linguistic preprocessing for improved quality.

test_embedding_with_chunking.docstring: Test embedding large documents using chunking.

test_content_type_based_embedding.docstring: Test embedding selection based on content type.

test_embedding_context_propagation.docstring: Test that context properties propagate to embedding system.

test_embedding_service_api.docstring: Test the high-level embedding service API.

test_embedding_similarity_calculation.docstring: Test embedding similarity calculations across subsystems.

test_embedding_vector_normalization.docstring: Test vector normalization in embedding process.

cosine_similarity.docstring: Utility function to calculate cosine similarity between vectors.
